description: MAFFT multiple sequence alignment (unaligned FASTA -> aligned FASTA).
rules: read-only on inputs; writes one artifact (aligned.fasta) under record_store
METHOD auto picks the strategy from sequence count (localpair <=200, --auto <=1000, fftns otherwise)
requires the mafft binary on PATH; without it the porter degrades gracefully and emits {}
usage: Set INPUT_FASTA (unaligned FASTA). Optional THREADS (default 4), METHOD (auto|linsi|einsi|fftnsi|fftns). Output: aligned.fasta.
limitation: Needs MAFFT installed (conda install -c bioconda mafft). Offline / without MAFFT the alignment is not produced; the output is a graceful {} placeholder.
